Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct an accepting Petri net for the described insurance claim process The process includes activities Claim Registration CR Document Verification DV Fraud Check FC Claim Assessment CA Approval AP Payment P Notification N Closure CL Additionally there are loops if documents incomplete after DV a Re Document Submission RDS step occurs before continuing Similarly if FC raises doubts an additional In depth Investigation II is performed possibly multiple times before proceeding to CA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to model this with a Petri net The net should have places representing states between activities transitions labeled with activity names arcs connecting them to form a logical sequence with possible loops

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to think about the structure The process is essentially a workflow with optional loops We can model it as a Petri net with places representing the state before and after each activity and transitions representing the activities The loops can be modeled by adding places that allow multiple passes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start new claim arrives We have a start place with initial token Then Claim Registration CR occurs After CR we go to Document Verification DV After DV if documents are complete proceed to Fraud Check FC If incomplete go to Re Document Submission RDS and then back to DV

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description says if documents are incomplete after Document Verification DV a re submission of documents step occurs Re Document Submission RDS before the process continues So after DV if incomplete we do RDS then presumably we need to verify again DV again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: In a Petri net we can have a place After DV From there we have two possible transitions one to FC if complete and one to RDS if incomplete

Name: Validation - PE
Text: After RDS we need to go back to the state before DV That place is the input place of DV which is After CR So after RDS we need to produce a token in After CR

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can have a loop After CR to DV to After DV to RDS to After CR

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Similarly for the FC II loop After FC if there are doubts we perform an In depth Investigation II and this can happen multiple times before proceeding to CA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: After FC we have a place After FC From there if no doubts go to CA If doubts go to II and after II go back to the state before FC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: FC input place is After DV So after II we need to produce a token in After DV

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: We need to introduce a transition that represents return to After CR after RDS But that transition would be instantaneous and not an activity We could model it as a dummy transition However the problem says transitions labeled with activity names So we should only have transitions for the activities Instead we can have an arc from RDS directly to After CR

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Similarly we do not need places After RDS and After II We can directly connect RDS to After CR and II to After DV

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The net becomes Places Start After CR After DV After FC After CA After AP After P After N Closed Transitions CR DV RDS FC II CA AP P N CL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Arcs Start to CR CR to After CR After CR to DV DV to After DV After DV to FC After DV to RDS FC to After FC After FC to CA After FC to II CA to After CA After CA to AP AP to After AP After AP to P P to After P After P to N N to After N After N to CL CL to Closed RDS to After CR II to After DV

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets trace a successful path Start to CR to After CR to DV to After DV to FC to After FC to CA to After CA to AP to After AP to P to After P to N to After N to CL to Closed Thats a valid sequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: With loops DV to After DV to RDS to After CR to DV to After DV to FC to After FC to II to After DV to FC to After FC to CA also works

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to define the initial marking im token in Start Final marking fm token in Closed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The final marking is reachable Our net satisfies that
